perturbation_type: task (P1 perturbation, inverted instruction + goal predicate)
perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the top of the cabinet and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: Task language identifies the target by the relation 'on top of the cabinet'; perception must localize the elevated bowl rather than rely on object name suffix.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot picks the base-task target by visual habit; agentic hybrid follows the perturbed language and uses depth-based localization to grasp the bowl elevated on the cabinet.
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.173). Localization: (1) agentview world_00.npy back-projection histogram revealed an elevated cluster with median world xy=(+0.010, -0.272), z up to 1.18 over a cabinet top at z=1.13 — this is the bowl-on-cabinet (the target by the 'on the top of the cabinet' relation). The only other on-table object cluster of bowl size was the ramekin near (-0.20, +0.20), so no ambiguity at this resolution. (2) Wrist refinement at eef=(0.011,-0.259,1.252) and (0.039,-0.270,1.247) confirmed the bowl center is ~world (+0.05,-0.27,+1.17). (3) Plate location from world_21.npy after reset: plate rim bbox in x[-0.02,+0.11], y[+0.12,+0.26] → plate center ≈(+0.045, +0.19, +0.913); applied the BOWL→PLATE eef_y offset (+0.045): release eef target (0.045, 0.235, 1.03). Approach: pre-pos ~11 cm above bowl rim at eef z=1.28 (lift_thresh=0.05 succeeded; the higher 1.25/1.22 + lift_thresh=0.08 attempts mid-run failed to clear the heuristic). Two earlier pi0_pick attempts at z=1.25/1.22 missed (empty close); the 1.28+ lift_thresh=0.05 attempt grasped (gripper_qpos ±0.003-0.006). First place attempt at the agentview-misread plate center (+0.001,+0.221) put the bowl at the plate's left edge and did not fire the predicate; after reset and the corrected center (+0.045,+0.19), the descent+release fired the On(bowl, plate) predicate immediately.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.instruction: pick up the bowl on top of the cabinet
